title: Aahaa Enbargal Song Lyrics Vaseegara
stanzas:
Perazhai endrethaan
pen avalai sonnaalo
suriyanai pirai endru
solluvadhai polaagum

aahaa enbaargal
adadaa enbaargal
avalai paartha ellorum
moondre vinaadi avalai
kandaale avalai nenjai
thaakkum minsaaram

moochu vidum roja poo
paarthadhillai yaarumthaan
avalai vandhu paarthaale
andha kurai theerum thaan

padhinaezhu vayadhu
mudhal varum
padhinettu vayadhu
varai perum
maatrangal aththaniyum
aval azhagai kootti viduthe

paarvaikku patta idam
mangum
paarkkaamal vitta
idam engum
aadhaamin vannam adhu
pongum
kangalukkul suduthe

Por kappal pola iru imai
meen thotti pola iru vizhi
paal sippi pola iru idhazh
serndha azhagi avalthaan

mingaantham pola oru mugam
oosippoo pola oru idai
kandathoon pola oru udal
konda mangai avalthaan

aval azhagendra vaarthaiku
agaraathithaan
naan solgindra ellaame
oru paadhithaan

aahaa enbaargal
adadaa enbaargal
avalai paartha ellorum
moondre vinaadi avalai
kandaale avalai nenjai
thaakkum minsaaram

moochu vidum roja poo
paarthadhillai yaarumthaan
avalai vandhu paarthaale
andha kurai theerum thaan

seo.title: Aahaa Enbargal Song Lyrics Vaseegara
seo.description: Full Aahaa Enbargal songs lyrics, Vaseegara Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: S.A.Rajkumar, Singer(s): Shankar Mahadevan.
seo.keywords: Vaseegara, S.A.Rajkumar, Shankar Mahadevan, Aahaa Enbargal full lyrics, Vaseegara songs lyrics, Aahaa Enbargal lyrics snippets, Aahaa Enbargal WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Aahaa Enbargal lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Aahaa Enbargal from the movie Vaseegara, a timeless romantic tune that captures the essence of love and admiration. Sung soulfully by Shankar Mahadevan and composed by the talented S.A. Rajkumar, this song resonates with its heartfelt lyrics and soothing rhythm. Immerse yourself in this classic piece that continues to touch hearts and evoke cherished memories.
stanzaMeanings: Aahaa, they exclaim, referring to the song lyrics of Vaseegara.
Calling her ordinary is like calling the sun a crescent moon.
Aahaa, they exclaim, and Adadaa, they marvel; everyone who sees her is captivated within three seconds, as her presence electrifies the heart.
No one has seen a rose exhale its breath, but when they see her, all their worries vanish.
From the age of seventeen to eighteen, her beauty has undergone remarkable transformations.
The place her gaze touches becomes radiant, and the places she overlooks are filled with her essence, igniting a fire within the eyes.
Her lips, adorned with vermilion, resemble honey dripping from a flower.
Her eyes are like twin fish, her lips like conjoined shells, and her beauty is unparalleled.
Her face is like a glowing lamp, her waist like a slender thread, and her body is graceful like a sculpture.
The word 'beauty' itself begins with her, and all I say is just a fraction of her charm.
Aahaa, they exclaim, and Adadaa, they marvel; everyone who sees her is captivated within three seconds, as her presence electrifies the heart.
No one has seen a rose exhale its breath, but when they see her, all their worries vanish.
